## Description
## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Refactoring (`refactor:`)
- [ ] Documentation update (`docs:`)
- [ ] CI/CD or Chore (`chore:`)

## Architecture & Quality Checklist
- [ ] **Conventional Commits**: My commit messages strictly follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) specification.
- [ ] **SOLID Principles**: My code adheres to the SOLID principles. I have favored extension over modification (OCP) and kept responsibilities strictly separated (SRP).
- [ ] **100% Coverage**: I have written tests for my changes using **JUnit 5**. The **JaCoCo** report confirms 100% line and branch coverage.
- [ ] **TDD Approach**: Tests were written to verify the behavior (including edge cases) before or alongside the implementation.
- [ ] **Code Quality**: My code compiles without warnings, passes all existing tests, and includes updated Javadoc where necessary.

## Additional Notes
